sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ بَرَزَ فِي الْآوِنَةِ الْأَخِيرَةِ وَعْيٌ مُتَزايِدٌ بِأَهَمِّيَّةِ الْعَوْدَةِ إِلَى الْغِذاءِ الْعُضْوِيِّ وَالْأَنِماطِ الزِّراعِيَّةِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ لِمُواجَهَةِ الْأَمْراضِ الْمُعاصِرَةِ.
sentences.translation: U posljednje vrijeme pojavila se sve veća svijest o važnosti povratka organskoj hrani i tradicionalnim poljoprivrednim obrascima radi suočavanja sa savremenim bolestima.
sentences.translationEn: Recently, there has emerged an increasing awareness of the importance of returning to organic food and traditional agricultural patterns to combat contemporary diseases.

sentences.arabic: يُؤَكِّدُ خُبَراءُ التَّغْذِيَةِ أَنَّهُ لَوِ اعْتَمَدَ الْإِنْسانُ عَلَى الْمُنْتَجاتِ الْمَحَلِّيَّةِ الْمَوْسِمِيَّةِ، لَتَجَنَّبَ كَثِيراً مِنَ الْمُشْكِلاتِ الصِّحِّيَّةِ الْمُرْتَبِطَةِ بِالْأَطْعِمَةِ الْمُصَنَّعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Nutricionisti potvrđuju da bi čovjek, kada bi se oslanjao na lokalne sezonske proizvode, izbjegao mnoge zdravstvene probleme povezane s prerađenom hranom.
sentences.translationEn: Nutritionists emphasize that if humans relied on local seasonal products, they would avoid many health problems associated with processed foods.

sentences.arabic: يَتِمُّ حالِيّاً إِعادَةُ اكْتِشافِ الْعَدِيدِ مِنَ الْوَصَفاتِ التَّراثِيَّةِ وَتَعْدِيلِها لِتُناسِبَ الِاحْتِياجاتِ الْغِذائِيَّةَ الْحَدِيثَةَ مَعَ الْحِفاظِ عَلَى نَكْهَتِها الْأَصِيلَةِ.
sentences.translation: Trenutno se ponovo otkrivaju brojni tradicionalni recepti i prilagođavaju savremenim nutritivnim potrebama uz očuvanje njihovog autentičnog okusa.
sentences.translationEn: Many traditional recipes are currently being rediscovered and modified to suit modern nutritional needs while maintaining their authentic flavor.

sentences.arabic: وَعَلَى الرَّغْمِ مِنْ أَنَّ التَّصْنِيعَ سَهَّلَ إِنْتاجَ الْغِذاءِ، إِلَّا أَنَّ جَوْدَةَ الْمُكَوِّناتِ الْمَقْطُوفَةِ مِنْ مَزارِعَ مُسْتَدامَةٍ تَظَلُّ الْأَفْضَلَ نَفْعاً وَمَذاقاً.
sentences.translation: Iako je industrijalizacija olakšala proizvodnju hrane, kvalitet sastojaka ubranih s održivih farmi ostaje najbolji po korisnosti i okusu.
sentences.translationEn: Although industrialization has facilitated food production, the quality of ingredients harvested from sustainable farms remains the best in terms of benefit and taste.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يُعْتَبَرُ الِاسْتِثْمارُ فِي النِّظامِ الْغِذائِيِّ الصِّحِّيِّ اسْتِثْماراً فِي مُسْتَقْبَلِ الصِّحَّةِ الْعامَّةِ لِلْأَجْيالِ الْقادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stoga se ulaganje u zdrave prehrambene navike smatra ulaganjem u budućnost javnog zdravlja za buduće generacije.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, investing in a healthy diet is considered an investment in the future of public health for upcoming generations.
